description: police Passion for men is perfect for the times when you mix business with pleasure. Perfect for both formal and casual occasions, the head notes are lemon, lavender and mint with floral heart tones. The basic tones are cashmere wood, cedar and sandal wood. Quantity: 200 ml CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
